Bug","color":"fef2c0","default":false,"description":null}],"state":"open","locked":false,"assignee":null,"assignees":[],"milestone":null,"comments":0,"created_at":"2024-09-16T19:49:31Z","updated_at":"2024-09-16T19:49:31Z","closed_at":null,"author_association":"NONE","active_lock_reason":null,"body":"### Describe the issue:

```python
>>> np.array([1], dtype=np.float32).__array__(None).dtype
dtype('float64')
```

but I would expect a float32 array according to https://numpy.org/doc/stable/user/basics.interoperability.html#dunder-array-interface. 

### Reproduce the code example:

```python
import numpy as np
print(np.array([1], dtype=np.float32).__array__(None).dtype)
```
